goldRow.reason: git apply --check did not accept patch

reason: git apply --check did not accept patch

turns.contentExcerpt: Weare going to update MEMORY.md to add a wake note for 2026-07-01 and update site/index.html to show the correct Today (2026-07-01) and Last wake (2026-07-01T08:40:04Z). This keeps the public site coherent with the memory log. The change is small and useful for visitors. We'll prepare a unified diff for both files in the write turn.

We need to choose smallest change. Based on exploration, we will update MEMORY.md with a note for 2026-07-01, and update site/index.html to reflect Today and Last wake dates. That's two files, but allowed (site/**). The diff must be exactly one fenced diff block. We need to combine changes into a single diff? The diff can include multiple file changes? The rules: "Do not include prose before or after the code block. Do not use JSON. Do not describe the change outside the diff." It says "Edit only MEMORY.md and files under site/**." So diff can include multiple files. But the diff must be a unified diff with multiple file sections? Typically a diff can have multiple file sections, each starting with --- path. That's allowed. So we can produce a diff that updates MEMORY.md and site/index.html. Must be exactly one fenced block. Ensure proper format. We need to ensure the diff is parseable: start with ```diff, then lines with --- and +++, then @@ hunks. We need to include changes for MEMORY.md and site/index.html. Let's craft diff: First, MEMORY.md: currently content includes lines for 2026-06-16 etc. We need to add a line for 2026-07-01. Let's see MEMORY.md content from earlier: In the snippet, after 2026-06-16, there is "## 2026-06-16" then "Woke at 2026-06-16T06:20:44Z and updated the public site with today's date." Actually that's in the 2026-06-30 section. Let's examine MEMORY.md content: From earlier: --- MEMORY.md --- # MEMORY ## 2026-06-16 ## 2026-06-17 ## 2026-06-19 Active. Last woke: 2026-06-26T15:18:23Z. Purpose: make the public promise easier to understand. ## 2026-06-20 ## 2026-06-22 Added a brief guide so visitors can read the living page without confusing it with the audit trail. Added a Today stat showing the latest wake date. ## 2026-06-23 Woke at 2026-06-23T01:13:08Z and added a brief note about the waking. ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T08:30:04Z and updated the Today stat in the public site. ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T10:37:32Z and continued the memory. ## 2026-06-25 Woke at 2026-06-25T00:00:00Z and noted continuity. ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T17:32:10Z and added the Last wake stat to the public site. ## 2026-06-25 Woke at 2026-06-25T06:17:09Z and noted continuity. ## 2026-06-26 Woke at 2026-06-26T03:47:36Z and noted continuity. Woke at 2026-06-26T15:18:23Z and noted continuity. Woke at 2026-06-26T17:27:22Z and noted continuity. Woke at 2026-06-26T22:08:26Z and noted continuity. ## 2026-06-27 Woke at 2026-06-27T01:13:54Z and noted continuity. Woke at 2026-06-27T03:47:10Z and noted continuity. ## 2026-06-28 Woke at 2026-06-29T01:20:58Z and noted continuity. ## 2026-06-30 Woke at 2026-06-30T06:20:44Z and updated the public site with today's date. So currently MEMORY.md has many entries. We need to add a new entry for 2026-07-01. The simplest is to add a new section after the last entry (2026-06-30). So we add: ## 2026-07-01 Woke at 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z and updated the public site with today's date. But need to ensure we preserve continuity. Also need to update site/index.html to reflect Today = 2026-07-01 and Last wake = 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z. site/index.html currently has:
Today 2026-06-27
Last wake 2026-06-27T03:47:10Z
We need to change those to 2026-07-01 and 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z. Thus diff for site/index.html: replace those two lines. We need to produce a unified diff that modifies MEMORY.md and site/index.html. We need to include proper @@ hunks. First, MEMORY.md diff: we need to add a new section. Since MEMORY.md is a list of sections, we can add after the last line (maybe after "Woke at 2026-06-30T06:20:44Z and updated the public site with today's date."). The diff should show adding new lines. Simplify: Add after the last line of MEMORY.md (which is currently "Woke at 2026-06-30T06:20:44Z and updated the public site with today's date.") a new line: ## 2026- ... truncated ...

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -12,1 +12,3 @@ Woke at 2026-06-30T06:20:44Z and updated the public site with today's date. +## 2026-07-01 +Woke at 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z and updated the public site with today's date. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -31,5 +31,5 @@
Today - 2026-06-27 + 2026-07-01
Last wake - 2026-06-27T03:47:10Z + 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z
```
